{{Quote|We're all going to die! But I'd hoped more of you would come and die with me...|Camas to Squad 40 before his death|<ref name="IC501" />}}
'''Iri Camas''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. Stationed on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], General Camas was placed in command of the [[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]] at the beginning of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]; a conflict between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], Iri Camas was raised by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] from early childhood, [[Jedi training/Legends|learning]] the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Eventually passing the [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]], Camas was made a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] and, after further study and devotion to the Order, became a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. Serving the Order throughout the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], Master Camas dutifully took up the rank of [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the newly formed [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] when the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] escalated the Separatist Crisis with the Republic.<ref name="RCTZ" />

Unlike most of his brother and sister Jedi, Camas was placed in an office, serving as [[Director of Special Forces]] on Coruscant and was in command of one of the two [[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]].<ref name="RCTZ" /> Camas' primary concern was the effectiveness of clone troopers, and under his command, the troopers averaged a kill-ratio of 200 [[Battle droid|Battle Droids]] per trooper and [[clone commando]]s were trained to target droid manufacturing and raw material plants, destroying billions more.<ref name="CSWE" />

In the days following the fateful [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|first battle]] on [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]], Camas attempted to have the [[Null-class Advanced Recon Commando]]s put into stasis, hoping that he could use them only when needed as they were considered too independent and hard to control. However, the commandos resisted stasis and Camas demanded to speak with their trainer, [[Kal Skirata]]. By the time Skirata had arrived, the Null commandos had taken control of the [[Special Operations Brigade Headquarters|Special Ops HQ barracks]], and the [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]] was called in to quell the standoff. Camas, refusing to allow the destruction of the barracks just to contain six unruly clones, ended the standoff by reversing the suspended animation order and appointed Skirata special adviser status to keep the Nulls in line.<ref name="RCTZ" /> Soon after that, due to mass casualties, Master Camas' brigade was merged with that of Master [[Arligan Zey]].

Serving the Republic dutifully throughout the rest of the war, Master Camas was able to flee Coruscant when the Grand Army was ordered to slaughter all Jedi by [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], alter-ego of [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]]. Going to ground, Camas worked with fellow Masters [[Plett]], [[Vamilad]] and [[Djinn Altis/Legends|Djinn Altis]] to shuttle surviving [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] out of the eye of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Part of a network that moved apprentices to [[Plett's Well|the Well]] on [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]], Camas stationed himself in a safe house in the city of [[Chelpori]] on [[Celen]]. Assisted by the [[Antarian Rangers/Legends|Antarian Ranger]] [[Jilam Kester]], Camas was tracked by the Empire, which dispatched members of the [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]] to neutralize him. [[Squad 40]] surrounded his position, being lured inside to confront him. Wielding a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]], after having allowed Ranger Kester to escape, the war-weary Camas used his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] to ignite the gas main and the building exploded. While three members of the squad escaped, Camas was able to kill one alongside himself. When the surviving troopers searched the rubble, they discovered Camas' remains as well as his lightsaber embedded in the wall opposite the explosion.<ref name="IC501" />
